summary: Tested WebSocket Notifications, Scheduled Jobs, and Push Notification Integration features. Fixed bug where scheduler_running was always false because the flag wasn't being set in server.py lifespan. All 16 tests passed after fix.

bugs_fixed.issue: scheduler_running flag was always false because scheduled_jobs.is_running was never set to True in the lifespan. Fixed by adding 'scheduled_jobs.is_running = True' after scheduler.start()

critical_code_review_comments: NotificationWebSocketManager correctly implements user connection tracking with send_to_user, broadcast, and specialized notification methods (win_back, outbid, points_earned, event_reminder)
ScheduledJobsManager has 4 jobs configured: daily_churn_analysis (3AM), win_back_dispatch (4h), auction_ending_notifications (5m), event_reminders (15m)
Push notification integration uses Expo's push API via send_push_notification_to_token in routes/shared.py
WebSocket endpoint /api/ws/notifications requires JWT token for authentication and handles ping/pong, mark_read, get_unread messages
context_for_next_testing_agent: WebSocket Notifications, Scheduled Jobs, and Push Notification features fully tested. Notification WS endpoints: /api/ws/notifications/stats (GET), /api/ws/notifications/online/{user_id} (GET), /api/ws/notifications (WS). Jobs endpoints: /api/jobs/status, /api/jobs/churn-summary, /api/jobs/win-back-summary, /api/jobs/trigger. All 4 scheduled jobs confirmed running: daily_churn_analysis, win_back_dispatch, auction_ending_notifications, event_reminders.

mocked_apis.Push_Notifications: MOCKED - No real device tokens, uses Expo push API
mocked_apis.AI_Features: LIVE - Using Claude API via Emergent LLM Key

notification_user_online_check.details: Returns user_id and online boolean status

notification_ws_endpoint.details: WebSocket endpoint accepts connections with JWT token, handles ping/pong, mark_read, get_unread

jobs_status.details: Returns scheduler_running (true), jobs list (4 jobs), recent_runs. Requires admin/venue_manager role

churn_summary.details: Returns stats with risk_distribution, total_at_risk, churned_60d, last_analysis_run

trigger_job.details: Admin-only endpoint to manually trigger scheduled jobs

scheduler_running.details: Scheduler confirmed running with 4 jobs: daily_churn_analysis (3AM), win_back_dispatch (4h), auction_ending_notifications (5m), event_reminders (15m)

push_notification_integration.details: Push notification function available in routes/shared.py, used by win-back dispatch job (MOCKED - no real device tokens)
